scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install
scripts.host: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run host --prefix frontend"
